segments.text: Perfect positioning! Mashing out, grab doesn't land, smash whiffs from that distance - up special brings them back down!
segments.original_text: 立ち位置いい暴れつかみを許さないスマッシュも当たらない位置で上必殺技下に戻ってくる

segments.text: Charge shot is shielded over there, but here the grab connects - back throw!
segments.original_text: 反対側でチャージショットがシールドされているがここはつかみが通った後ろ投げ

segments.text: Still has distance to the blast line, not getting KO'd. Yagura's Samus is being juggled, but...
segments.original_text: ラインがあるのでまだ撃墜しない矢浦サムスの着地狩りがされているが

segments.text: Back to the ledge here, mashing works! But the fair completely whiffs - dash attack lands!
segments.original_text: ここは崖に戻ってくる暴れも通してだが空前引きすっぽ抜けてしまったためダッシュアタックが間に合った

full_text: Perfect positioning! Mashing out, grab doesn't land, smash whiffs from that distance - up special brings them back down! Charge shot is shielded over there, but here the grab connects - back throw! Still has distance to the blast line, not getting KO'd. Yagura's Samus is being juggled, but... Back to the ledge here, mashing works! But the fair completely whiffs - dash attack lands! Takes Game 5!
